intent: Run until a declared gate before a consequential action; freeze all state at the gate; resume, adjust, or abort based on a human verdict delivered through the runtime's approval stance.

state.work_product: object — everything produced up to the gate
state.pending_action: object — the exact action awaiting approval, human-readable

termination: executor completes after approval, or the gate ends the run on rejection/timeout; timeout never defaults to approval
